positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial map print featuring interconnected cosmic fauna, such as stylized glowing jellyfish and soaring crescent moon wolves, floating within a nebula of deep indigo and teal. The composition must be a central, symmetrical, circular arrangement designed for maximum contrast. Use clean, graphic silhouettes with glowing neon outlines on a dark, starry background. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau and psychedelic bioluminescence. Dramatic, ethereal backlighting and soft rim lighting accentuate the forms. Highly detailed, vector illustration aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing.
